elements.label: Description
elements.value: Very large tier. Only achievable through sustained chain merging. Merges into Melon.

onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/pineapple.schema.json, set ct_pine_radius to {{ct_pine_radius}}]
Set Pineapple radius to {{ct_pine_radius}} pixels.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/pineapple.schema.json, set ct_pine_score to {{ct_pine_score}}]
Set Pineapple merge score to {{ct_pine_score}} points.
